zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily De Pagnell於大約1115年出生在英國武斯特斯爾杜德利時，她的父親Gervaise de Pagnell19歲，母親Baroness Cecily FitzAnsculph14歲。她於1135年與Sir Ralph Maunsell結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她去世於1175年享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecily De Pagnell于大约1115年出生在英国武斯特斯爾杜德利时，她的父亲Gervaise de Pagnell19岁，母亲Baroness Cecily FitzAnsculph14岁。她于1135年与Sir Ralph Maunsell结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。她去世于1175年享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pagnell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: possibly from Middle English panel, panel(l)e ‘cloth, saddle-cloth, saddle’ or ‘pane (of glass)’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a maker of such items.
from the Middle English personal name Paynel (Old French Payenel, Latin Paganellus), a pet form of Payne (from Latin Paganus).

variants.name: Payne
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Pai(e)n, Pagen (from Latin Paganus), a fairly common personal name among Normans. It derived from a word that originally meant ‘villager, rustic’, later ‘heathen’, but it had doubtless lost these connotations in its use as a late medieval personal name. This name has also been established in Ireland since the 14th century.

History: Thomas Payne, who was a freeman of Plymouth Colony in 1639, was the founder of a large American family, which included Robert Treat Paine (1731–1814), one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence. See also   Paine  .

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily De Pagnell was born about 1115, in Dudley, Worcestershire, England, her father, Gervaise de Pagnell, was 19 and her mother, Baroness Cecily FitzAnsculph, was 14. She married Sir Ralph Maunsell in 1135. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She died in 1175, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily De Pagnell est née environ 1115, à Dudley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Gervaise de Pagnell, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Baroness Cecily FitzAnsculph, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Ralph Maunsell en 1135. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle est décédée en 1175, à l’âge de 61 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily De Pagnellが約1115年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアダドリーで生まれた時，父Gervaise de Pagnellは19歳，母Baroness Cecily FitzAnsculphは14歳であった。1135年にSir Ralph Maunsellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼女は1175年に61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily De Pagnell(이)가 대략 1115년 영국 워스스터실르 드들리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gervaise de Pagnell(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Baroness Cecily FitzAnsculph(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1135년 Sir Ralph Maunsell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1175년 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily De Pagnell родилась около 1115 г. в местности дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Gervaise de Pagnell было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Baroness Cecily FitzAnsculph, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Ralph Maunsell в 1135 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Она умерла в 1175 г. в возрасте 61 год.
